name: How much does AI screw up legal advice—worth the risk?

mainEntity.name: How much does AI screw up legal advice—worth the risk?

acceptedAnswer.description: High hallucination rates make it unreliable; verification mandatory but risky without expertise.[3][5] Courts punish errors.[3] Key factors: No privilege amplifies dangers; better for low-risk research.[2] Skip for case specifics. Use lawyers only.
